meaning: n.刮,擦,挖,刮削下的碎屑adj.刮擦的,吝啬的
examples: She stumbled and fell, scraping her palms and knees.
She went around the car scraping the frost off the windows.
The car hurtled past us, scraping the wall and screeching to a halt.
After scraping by, Rollhaus came back to the States to try his hand at venture capital.
He figures his business will just keep scraping by on service and used cars.
